message:
feat(ui): UltraWide breakpoint, style system refactoring, and search surface snapshot updates

Adds UltraWide layout breakpoint to the responsive breakpoint system
and refactors the style system and TUI rendering:

- style_system.rs: New UltraWide breakpoint variant in breakpoint_name.

- app.rs: Layout and rendering adjustments for the new breakpoint tier,
  plus continued refinement of the footer HUD and search surface.

- analytics_charts.rs: Chart layout adjustments.

- html_export/template.rs + lib.rs: Export template and counting
  refinements.

8 search surface snapshots updated to reflect the rendering changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
